name: React Native
description: Build native mobile apps using React and JavaScript. Shared codebase for iOS and Android with native UI components.

name: Flutter
description: Google's UI toolkit for building natively compiled apps for mobile, web, and desktop from a single Dart codebase.

name: Ionic
description: Cross-platform mobile framework using web technologies. Build with Angular, React, or Vue and deploy everywhere.

name: Capacitor
description: Native runtime for building cross-platform apps with web tech. Access native APIs from any web framework.

name: .NET MAUI
description: Microsoft framework for building native mobile and desktop apps with C# and XAML. Successor to Xamarin.Forms.

name: Kotlin Multiplatform
description: Share Kotlin business logic across Android, iOS, web, and desktop. Native UI on each platform with shared core.

name: NativeScript
description: Build truly native mobile apps with JavaScript, TypeScript, Angular, or Vue. Direct access to native platform APIs.

name: Expo
description: Platform for building React Native apps. Managed workflow, OTA updates, EAS Build, and extensive native module library.

name: SwiftUI
description: Apple's declarative UI framework for building apps across all Apple platforms with Swift. Live previews in Xcode.

name: Jetpack Compose
description: Android's modern declarative UI toolkit. Build native UIs with Kotlin using composable functions and reactive state.

name: Android Studio
description: Official IDE for Android development by Google. Emulator, layout editor, profiling tools, and Gradle build system.

name: Xcode
description: Apple's IDE for developing apps for iOS, macOS, watchOS, and tvOS. Interface Builder, Instruments, and Simulator.

name: Flipper
description: Extensible mobile app debugger by Meta. Inspect network, layout, databases, and logs for iOS and Android apps.

name: App Center
description: Microsoft's mobile DevOps service. Build, test, distribute, and monitor iOS and Android apps from one place.

name: Fastlane
description: Automate iOS and Android builds, testing, screenshots, and App Store / Play Store deployments from the command line.

name: TestFlight
description: Apple's beta testing service for iOS, macOS, watchOS, and tvOS apps. Distribute builds to testers before release.

name: scrcpy
description: Display and control Android devices from your desktop via USB or WiFi. Low latency, no root required.

name: Maestro
description: Mobile UI testing framework with simple YAML-based test flows. Supports iOS and Android with built-in waiting and retry.

name: Genymotion
description: Fast Android emulator for development and testing. Cloud and desktop versions with device sensor simulation.

name: Appetize
description: Stream iOS and Android apps in the browser for demos, support, and testing. No downloads or installs required.

name: Firebase App Distribution
description: Distribute pre-release iOS and Android builds to testers. Integrates with Fastlane and CI/CD pipelines.

name: Electron
description: Build cross-platform desktop apps with JavaScript, HTML, and CSS. Powers VS Code, Slack, Discord, and many more.

name: Tauri
description: Build lightweight desktop apps with web frontends and Rust backends. Much smaller binaries than Electron.

name: Qt
description: Comprehensive C++ framework for cross-platform desktop, embedded, and mobile apps. Includes Qt Quick for modern UIs.

name: GTK
description: Cross-platform widget toolkit for creating graphical user interfaces. The foundation of GNOME desktop applications.

name: Avalonia
description: Cross-platform .NET UI framework. Build desktop apps for Windows, macOS, and Linux with XAML and C#.

name: Wails
description: Build desktop apps with Go backends and web frontends. Uses native webview instead of bundling a browser.

name: Neutralinojs
description: Lightweight cross-platform desktop app framework. Uses the OS native webview with a thin backend, minimal footprint.

name: wxWidgets
description: Mature C++ library for cross-platform GUI development. Uses native controls on each platform for authentic look.

name: JUCE
description: C++ framework for audio applications and plugins. Build VST, AU, and AAX plugins with cross-platform GUI support.

name: Compose Multiplatform
description: JetBrains framework extending Jetpack Compose to desktop, web, and iOS. Share UI code across platforms with Kotlin.

name: Dear ImGui
description: Immediate-mode GUI library for C++. Minimal setup, fast iteration for tools, debug UIs, and prototyping.

name: Slint
description: Declarative GUI toolkit for embedded and desktop apps. Rust, C++, and JavaScript APIs with a custom markup language.

name: Iced
description: Cross-platform GUI library for Rust inspired by Elm. Type-safe, reactive, with built-in widgets and custom renderers.

name: Fyne
description: Material Design GUI toolkit for Go. Build cross-platform desktop and mobile apps with a simple, clean API.

name: egui
description: Immediate-mode GUI library for Rust. Runs natively and on the web via WebAssembly. Simple, portable, and fast.
